title: Magnificently Roasted Japanese Chicken Skewers
description: A crowd-pleasing Japanese dish featuring roasted chicken skewers marinated in a mixture of white wine vinegar and spices, perfect for a dinner party. The ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients make it a great option for those looking for a balanced meal.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a mortar and pestle, pound the ginger and garlic until well combined.
In a large bowl, whisk together the white wine vinegar, soy sauce, brown sugar, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the raclette grill and roast for 12-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Brush the skewers with the remaining marinade during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with sliced green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
